title: Write ferrum_extlib_cert.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_cert: X.509 certificate parsing, validation, and revocation. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: DER parse to typed cert struct (reference-counted), RFC 5280 path validation (explicit at_time parameter, never calls clock), name constraints, EKU, SAN, AIA chasing, OCSP, CRL, DANE TLSA stapling.
